name: Eshwari
wish: Happy Birthday to my favourite cutie, Darshan MP 💖 My naughty, funny Benne Dose Boy 😝❤️ No matter how much you tease me, you’ll always be my favourite. You bring smiles, fun, and madness everywhere. Stay the same crazy, lovable person. May your day be full of laughter, love, and happiness. Love you lots 🥰🎂✨

name: Shruthi
wish: Happy Birthday Darshan MP! 🎉 Our biggest extrovert headache 😌 You’re truly talented—dance, anchoring, comedy—you do everything so well. You light up every place with your energy and humour. Life would be boring without you. Keep shining and making everyone laugh. YENRI NIMMA TALENT 😅 Happy Birthday once again ❤️

name: Lakshitha
wish: Happy Birthday Darshan MP ❤️ My energetic Professor 😝 Thank you for supporting me during the short film shoot and making everything fun. You’re my air cooler in stressful moments with your silly jokes. Stay happy, naughty, and full of life always. Wishing you lots of happiness 🥰🎂✨

name: Anonymous
wish: Happy Birthday to the most stylish boy in Mahesh PU College 😌✨ Class hero of many hearts 😎 Thank you for helping me during exams and always motivating me to believe in myself. Your support means a lot. Stay confident, caring, and amazing always. Wishing you happiness, success, and love 🎂✨
